title: Garlicky Juicy Argentinian Steak Skewers
description: Tender steak skewers infused with the rich flavors of Argentina, featuring garlic, pickle, and dairy-free friendly ingredients, perfect for a brunch gathering.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together garlic, parsley, oregano, pickle juice, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced steak to the marinade, tossing to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Thread the marinated steak onto the soaked skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the steak reaches an internal temperature of 130°F for medium-rare.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley and oregano if desired.
Offer a side of dairy-free chimichurri sauce for added flavor.
For an added crunch, serve with a side of grilled or toasted bread.
